hero.question: Will Tom Steyer win the California Governor Election in 2026?
hero.prob_take: The market has priced Steyer out almost entirely at 10.6%, treating a self-funded billionaire with statewide name recognition and $100M+ to burn as a fringe candidate in a wide-open race. That's lazy crowd thinking, the kind of mispricing that happens when retail traders anchor to "he already lost in 2018" and stop thinking.

daily_take.headline: Steyer surge signals California Dems still searching for a lane.
daily_take.deck: Tom Steyer's California Governor odds jumped 4.2 points overnight to 10.6%, a move that reeks of reactive betting rather than real conviction. The market's pricing in name recognition and a fat wallet, but ignore the nostalgia. Steyer's 2020 and 2024 presidential runs proved he can't convert spending into votes. Smart money fades this pop and waits for actual frontrunners to emerge from the field.
